evals.prompt: We already have a PTY harness for our terminal app. Use it to review the filtering experience end to end, capture evidence, and tell me what should become regression tests.
evals.expected_output: A harness-backed review covering filtering interactions, observed evidence, UX/correctness findings, and concrete test opportunities.

evals.prompt: Launch this TUI with the existing session harness, drive the startup and first-navigation flow like a new user, and give me a balanced report on UX friction and correctness issues.
evals.expected_output: A structured report grounded in harness evidence, with startup/navigation findings and next improvements.

evals.prompt: I want to compare before and after behavior for a TUI redesign. Use the harness to exercise the same scenario in both versions and tell me what improved, what regressed, and what we should test next.
evals.expected_output: A comparison-oriented review that uses reproducible harness scenarios, cites evidence, and proposes follow-up tests.
